description: Mechanical constants and rules for the growth/maturation/mycelium/ecosystem engine. Distilled from RULES-SPEC.md sections 1, 3, 4 and time.ts. These are pure data the engine reads; no logic is hardcoded. See docs/04-Automation.md for how the pipeline consumes them, and docs/02-Design-Decisions.md for the referenced decisions.

time.note: Unified single-clock model (D5): one month = 30 days everywhere, including RTFM month conversion and Plant Growth. Every campaignDay increment is one dawn (isDawn ≡ true).
time.prepMethodExpiryNote: save = 1/24 day (1 hour); with a whole-day clock any save-prep item is expired by the next day advance (D7).

rtfmInitiation.description: Requirements before a colony may begin accruing RTFM (maturation).
rtfmInitiation.toadstool: mycelium must fill the full hex area of the optimum volva diameter
rtfmInitiation.mushroom: mycelium must fill the full hex area of the optimum volva diameter
rtfmInitiation.shelfToadstool: mycelium must fill a horizontal line of hexes as long as the optimum cap diameter
rtfmInitiation.mold: needs 1 mycelium unit AND shade to begin; fully matured only at MRUOM (harvestable area = MRUOM)
rtfmInitiation.note: Sensitivity rules tagged appliesAt:'rtfmInitiation' add or remove contact/neighbor gates on top of these physical requirements. ringedBoostsGrowth (D17) satisfies the contact gates but not the physical fill.

shade.description: A hex is shaded when it meets any of these.
definitions: any hex directly beneath the cap of a mushroom/traditional toadstool that would otherwise be sun-exposed
for shelf toadstools: any growth shorter than the shelf toadstool's optimum cap height, adjacent to its shell-bottom-facing edge, within its diameter
shade.note: Shade requirement/provision is judged by INTENDED (non-penalized) height, not the diagonal-penalized actual height (D6). brownIgnoresShade comes from sensitivities.json brownIgnoresShade.

mycelium.mruomRequired: all fungi must maintain MRUOM to survive; a growth is not required to stay alive
mycelium.romgSpread: at each ROMG cycle boundary, each mycelium unit duplicates into one adjacent empty hex (never a hex holding a growth); surplus beyond empty neighbors dies unless already at/above MRUOM
mycelium.romgBoundary: myceliumAgeDays is cumulative; a cycle completes when myceliumAgeDays > 0 && myceliumAgeDays % romgDays === 0 (D13)
mycelium.growthBearingSuspendsRomg: ROMG for growth-bearing mycelium is suspended until the growth is removed; non-bearing mycelium spreads normally
mycelium.belowMruomRecovery: if mycelium drops below MRUOM it has exactly 1 ROMG cycle to recover or it dies completely

weeklyMove.rule: any number of unburdened (non-growth-bearing) units may move 1 hex into an adjacent empty space
weeklyMove.consumeReplace: moving into a hex holding another mycelium TYPE consumes and replaces it
weeklyMove.lockedIfBearing: growth-bearing mycelium is locked in place until harvest
weeklyMove.resolutionOrder: one unit at a time in seniority order (lower createdDay, then smaller id) per D3

mycelium.spreadCollisionOrder: two colonies targeting the same empty hex resolve by seniority (lower createdDay, then smaller colony id) per D2; loser spreads to another empty neighbor or its surplus dies

verticalGrowth.penaltyNote: -1 final height per 2 units of diagonal stem. Shade math still uses intended (non-penalized) height category (D6).

merge.description: Identical / same-Species colonies cultivated into adjacent hexes merge immediately into one colony.
merge.myceliumAgeDays: adopt the most recently cultivated colony's ROMG cycle position
merge.atMRUOM: recomputed against the shared Species MRUOM

harvest.note: Harvest resets maturityAgeDays to 0; mycelium survives; the growth must fully re-mature before a second harvest (D21). No partial credit.

ecosystem.onDamage: b/s/c/f damage from a failed save or while flanked halts all RTFM for 1 week; state = damaged

collapse.trigger: repeat b/s/c/f damage before RTFM resumes, or a critical fail
collapse.check: roll d100; any growth taller than the roll collapses (loses potency, unharvestable)
collapse.heightUsed: actual penalized current height at collapse time (D4)
collapse.escalation: a second collapse trigger after the first collapses ALL remaining growths
collapse.clearing: collapsed growths must be manually cleared before ecosystem RTFM can resume

plantGrowth.onDamaged: resets all RTFM cycles, restores damaged -> healthy

ecosystem.autoResume: damaged -> healthy after 1 week (ecosystemAutoResumeDays) if left unharmed
